title: Oscar's Morning Sounds
synopsis: Baby Oscar wakes up to the gentle sounds of a Sunday morning with his family, discovering the cozy noises that make home special.

pages.text: Oscar wakes up. The sun is warm and golden. What does Oscar hear?

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes sits up in his crib wearing soft blue pajamas. Golden Sunday morning light streams through the window, casting warm rays across his nursery. The room is bathed in gentle sunlight.
illustration.alt: Oscar waking up in his sunny nursery

pages.text: Sizzle, sizzle! Daddy makes pancakes in the kitchen. The pan goes sizzle, sizzle!

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes toddles into a sunlit kitchen where Daddy in striped pajamas flips pancakes. Golden morning light fills the modern kitchen. Steam rises from the sizzling pan creating cozy breakfast sounds.
illustration.alt: Daddy making sizzling pancakes while Oscar watches

pages.text: Rustle, rustle! Mama reads the newspaper. The pages go rustle, rustle!

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes sits beside Mama in matching family pajamas on a sunny couch. Golden hour light streams through windows as Mama gently turns newspaper pages with soft rustling sounds. The scene is warm and unhurried.
illustration.alt: Mama reading newspaper with rustling pages while Oscar listens

pages.text: Giggle, giggle! Oscar laughs with his family. Sunday mornings are full of happy sounds!

illustration.description: Oscar with short brown wavy hair, fair skin, warm hazel eyes giggles joyfully surrounded by his diverse family in cozy pajamas. Golden Sunday morning light fills their warm living room. Everyone is laughing together in the gentle, sunlit domestic scene.
illustration.alt: Oscar giggling happily with his loving family

metadata.illustrationStyle: Sunday morning light, golden hour, family pajamas, newspapers pancakes, gentle unhurried, modern diverse family, lazy morning, sunlit rooms, warm domestic

questions.question: What sound do the pancakes make?
questions.explanation: The pancakes go sizzle, sizzle in the pan!

questions.question: What does Mama read?
questions.explanation: Mama reads the newspaper that goes rustle, rustle!

questions.question: How does Oscar feel with his family?
questions.explanation: Oscar giggles and feels happy with his family on Sunday morning!
